creator: otis@FreeBSD.org
text:
(In reply to Juraj Lutter from comment #2)
Because for me (stable/14):

94803: __sysctl("user.localbase",2,0x24608fd42e38,0x24608daa6b18,0x0,0) = 0 (0x0)
94803: open("/usr/local/etc/mail/mailer.conf",O_RDONLY,0666) = 3 (0x3)

So the mailer.conf path in pkg-message is definitely correct.
